import json, re, os, math, unicodedata, sys, difflib, itertools, statistics
from collections import defaultdict, Counter

# Load the files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

def load_json(path):
    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        return json.load(f)

quran_data = load_json(quran_path)
hadith_data = load_json(hadith_path)

type(quran_data), len(quran_data), type(hadith_data), len(hadith_data)

import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None: 
        return ''
    s = s.replace(tatweel, '')
    # normalize punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', s)  # remove non-Arabic letters/punct except digits/spaces
    # normalize different alif/hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    # remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

# Add normalized text to quran data
for item in quran_data:
    item['norm'] = normalize_arabic(item['ayah_text'])

norm_samples = [quran_data[0]['ayah_text'], quran_data[0]['norm']]
norm_samples

original_full = "وَأَيُوبُ إِذْ نَادَى رَبَّهُ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ (41) فَاِنجِدْنِي بِمِثْلِهِ فَاِنجِدْنِي إِنَّكَ أَنتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ (42) وَتَلَوَّنَ لَهُ مَكانَ الشَّمْسِ (43) وَلَمَّا تَجَلَّى لَهُ الرُقَيْدُ قَالَ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِي فَرِدًا (44) وَاِنجِدْنِي مِن لَدُنكَ عَزَيمَةً (45) وَاِنجِدْنِي مُصَدِّقًا (46) وَإِنَّ لِي لَمِنْ عِنْدِكَ لَحَظًا (47) فَاِنجِدْنِي عَزِيزًا (48) وَاِنطَلِقْ بِعِبَادِيَ لِبَيتِ صِدْقٍ (49) إِنَّهُ لِيَ يَهْدِي إِلَيْهِ صِدْقًا وَإِنَّهُ لِيَ يَرْجِعُ إِلَيَّ دَخِيلًا (50) "
snippet = "وَأَيُوبُ ...يلًا (50)"
norm_full = normalize_arabic(original_full)
norm_full[:200], len(norm_full)

query = "وَأَيُوبُ إِذْ نَادَى رَبَّهُ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ"
norm_query = normalize_arabic(query)
norm_query

matches = [item for item in quran_data if norm_query in item['norm']]
len(matches), matches[:3]

def lcs(a,b):
    # compute length of LCS between strings a and b
    # DP with memory optimization might be heavy for long strings; but here small.
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

cand_text = matches[0]['ayah_text']
cand_norm = normalize_arabic(cand_text)
full_norm = norm_full
lcs_len = lcs(cand_norm, full_norm)
sim_by_cand = lcs_len/len(cand_norm)
sim_by_full = lcs_len/len(full_norm)
len(cand_norm), len(full_norm), lcs_len, sim_by_cand, sim_by_full
